---
draft: true 
date: last-modified 
---

## Agenda
**Multiscale Socio‑Ecological Dynamics in a Changing Climate**  
Human–nature interactions under climate change, from local to global scales.

### Focus Areas
- **Climate‑induced migration & aging** (admin‑level grids, Japan & global)
- **Heat & health** (hierarchical risk models; BYM2/INLA; WBGT thresholds)
- **Flood‑induced demographic change** (aging acceleration; spatial equity)
- **Biodiversity × Agriculture** (ecosystem resistance; NDVI/SPEI integration)

### Methods
- Bayesian spatial models (BYM2), GLMM/GLMM‑TMB
- CNN/RNN/GNN for spatiotemporal prediction
- Data fusion: WorldPop, AlphaEarth, NDVI, SPEI, admin shapefiles

> For project‑specific details, see **Projects** or recent talks.
